feed.title: AO3 - Batfamily Members & Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Batfamily Members & Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: one time, when it all goes wrong
entry.summary:
Author: Zuribat026

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 88,999Chapters: 14/?Kudos: 51

Summary: Beatrice is trying, all things considered. her family feels like it's breaking apart. Clark won't speak to her right now. and things keep happening around her.she needs to help everyone around her, the same way they need to help her.before they can't anymore. i don't own any of the characters and i don't give permission for AI to use my work

entry.title: Ajusshi from Gotham?
entry.summary:
Author: maemae18

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,602Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 30

Summary: Jimmy Fallon just dropped the bombshell of the century: 4K footage of Bruce Wayne's hidden activities in South Korea. While the world is obsessed with the "Mystery Ajusshi," the residents of Wayne Manor are dealing with the horrifying realization that their father has the range of a virtuoso and the footwork of a main dancer. Bruce maintains it was a publicity stunt and nothing more. Jason is already printing the "Hyung" t-shirts. or Bruce Wayne 'had' a Kpop phase that nobody knew about until it was finally released.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Chapter 3; Twilight
entry.summary:
Author: Corvix_Ailuranthrope_4313

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,216Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 3

Summary: Safeguard 27 had been a success, The Second Bruce Batman had protected Gotham with everything he had, but nothing lasts forever, including the age of The Second Batman. Now we enter The Twilight of the City. A calm has started to spread over The City, but will it last? Or is something lurking in the dark? Whatever it is, Batman will find it and like the Batmen before him, he will give everything for his City.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Another Perspective
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 93,339Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 520

Summary: A clash of opposing plans causes Batman to accidentally be doused with a hybrid of not-quite-Fear Toxin and Ivy's pheromones. In order to cope with the opposing influences, his brain convinces him that the four Rogues who were keyed to them - Scarecrow, Ivy, Harley Quinn, and Riddler - have been deaged into children. Obviously he'll have to bring them home and look after them until an antidote is made. Meanwhile, by order of the Batkids in order to NOT break Batman's mind, said Rogues are forced to play along.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.summary:

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,837Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 474

entry.title: What If Bruce got Hit by Magic...
entry.summary:
Author: sunnyhalfsugar

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,080Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 99

Summary: ...And it projects his thoughts out loud like a reverse mind reading? Beware, for you're about to learn the intimate, unfiltered thoughts of the Dark Knight. Featuring: emotional damage, secondhand embarrassment, and Bruce Wayne having zero thoughts about himself.   Warning: 80% of Bruce’s brain is just “my babies :)”

entry.title: A looped Intention.
entry.summary:
Author: Sleepy_Wolfes

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 156Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 0

Summary: “a new group with the name «MAESTRO» had appear for the last 4 months, tracking down wanted criminals, most are found in the Crime Alley, some are found in their house. The group had left a card with their Logo on it with quote that says: 'eye for an eye and tooth for a tooth', are they an Anti heroes? Or are they are Vigilantes? Until now, the police department had no significant and constant clue.” — MAESTRO, a very new phenomenon that appear 4 months ago At Gotham, the city of Criminals and dampness. How will these turns out?.   Anti Hero are not mine! The series belonged to @Ayano Cchi at YouTube, Tiktok and Insta.More things to be added!.

entry.title: I have emotional motion sickness
entry.summary:
Author: Ella_Katz

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,764Chapters: 2/4Kudos: 95

Summary: Why is Clark out to get him? Hasn’t he been a good boyfriend? Hasn’t he? Maybe he hasn’t, maybe he’s so sick in the brain that even Clark can sense it. Maybe by fattening him up, he would get back at Bruce for clearly ruining his life. Maybe- “Bruce? Breakfast is ready.” Clark’s grating voice was outside the bathroom door.   Unknown to anybody, Bruce had been struggling with food for nearly two decades.Unknown to anybody, Bruce stopped taking his medication.What follows is a man who couldn't stop himself from falling into a hole of intense disordered eating, paranoia, and unhealthy coping mechanisms that could cost him his life.That is, if the ones who love him don't stop him first.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Sawdust Eaters
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 84,004Chapters: 20/?Kudos: 49

Summary: Adrien gets added to a family group chat and he's going to make it their problem.Things take a very interesting turn as this turns out to be no ordinary family. Dick is never going to be able to visit Paris. Tim might lose his mind. Jason is having a good time.A game of Cat & Mouse begins between Adrien and Tim. What was supposed to be a simple game of chase to spice up Adrien's depressing life, becomes a whirlwind romance between the two as they chase one another across Gotham.

entry.title: Quarantine: Batfamily Edition
entry.summary:
Author: AJwarrior

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 26,500Chapters: 3/10Kudos: 68

Summary: Dick's got hidden trauma, Jason doesn't know how to deal with his own death, Cass wants to be safe, Tim overworks himself, Steph has mommy issues (and daddy issues, and other issues), Duke feels out of place, and Damian can't figure out how to connect. They've all got problems. Bruce is so tired. Pair all of that with a Lockdown, and Gotham's finest vigilantes are going to need a lot of hot cocoa and slumber parties to get through this one. ---- The batfamily deals with quarantine. Forced into proximity with each other, Bruce and his kids get into various shenanigans, heart-to-hearts, and movie nights, while also dealing with a very different Gotham than the one they are used to.

entry.title: Jack O' All Trades
entry.summary:
Author: BooksAndSchist

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,367Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 3

Summary: Liz Marino, goes by many names. Dorothy to the Scarecrow. Jack O' Lantern to the Joker and Harley. Winglass to Barbara. She is a criminal, a spy, and a double agent for the GCPD in return for a plea bargain after being caught abetting the Scarecrow. She currently works for the Joker, scraping by until the rat can be caught. Along the way, she runs into the Batfam and their various traumatic Joker-related experiences. Mild Spoiler: She does in fact join the batfam eventuallyWarning: Original Main Character (But she's cool)Vibes > Lore Accuracy

entry.title: Mr. and Mrs. Wayne
entry.summary:
Author: GothamNocturne

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 69,526Chapters: 31/?Kudos: 33

Summary: **This is the sequel to Bruce and Selina** Bruce Wayne finally chooses the life he once believed he couldn't have - a wife, a daughter, and a world he's trying to hold together. But peace in Gotham never comes without a cost. When an old debt pulls Selina into something she can't walk away from, secrets begin to fracture the foundation of both their marriage and the Justice League. As whispers of invasion spread and trust begins to erode, Bruce is forced to make an impossible choice: Stand with the world. Or stand with his family. Because sometimes the greatest threat isn't the one descending from the stars - It's the one everyone believes is already inside your home. And this time, the cowl may not survive the cost.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Boundaries and ways not to cross them
entry.summary:
Author: morallywrong

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,797Chapters: 8/8Kudos: 607

Summary: Bruce had known all day what was coming at him. Like watching a car crash in slow motion, he was unable to do anything about the situation.---Bruce was a man of many faces and he took care of whom he showed which side of himself. When the Justice League gives him the ultimatum to reveal himself or leave the League, he leaves. If only Superman, the man he loved, had shown him support... Instead, the other hero couldn't even look him in the eye.

entry.title: Never Have I Ever
entry.summary:
Author: MoonlitMiffy

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,735Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 39

Summary: Cass moves into the Family Wing.Her new life began the moment she stepped into her very own bedroom. She made it four steps in before her new little brother's dragged her out of it.The room can wait, the grand tour of the manor could not (or didn't want to).

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: A Billion Dollars In The Elevator
entry.summary:
Author: frostedpinkicing

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,446Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 54

Summary: Of course, sometimes shit goes down when there’s a billion dollars on an elevator. OR Cassandra might be a daddy’s girl, but nobody messes with her mother like that, especially not from Bruce. She and Damian would have to teach him a lesson for making you cry. Inspired by that infamous Jay Z VS Solange Elevator Fight at the Met Gala in 2014.

entry.title: The Hundred Day Curse
entry.summary:
Author: SolaceInSpace

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 154,374Chapters: 40/?Kudos: 4,899

Summary: Gotham was literally cursed but no one believed Bruce. He took it upon himself to fix it and after decades of searching, that solution came to him in the form of a little blue vial. Bruce was to take the curse within himself to temper it into something manageable.He thinks the others would call him stupid and stop him if they knew about this, but (un)fortunately for Bruce, his family hasn't spoken to him for forever. There was no one here to stop him.He downed the liquid and woke up as his nine-year-old self.Ch3 Excerpt:“Mother, do you remember those funny clouds above people’s heads I told you about? Well, I’m doing something about them but the process is very lonely. Or not. I think it’s just me. I’m the problem. I can’t seem to get people to like me enough to stay. I know–-… I’m aware that it’s due to my own shortcomings but sometimes, it feels like even the worst monsters have people that love them and yet I have no one.”Bruce let out a humourless chuckle and rested his forehead on his knees.“I just wish there was someone that cared about me.”

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Our Monkey, Our Circus
entry.summary:
Author: gardenfire45

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,014Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 131

Summary: Alfred wants the Batfamily to get along, So Bruce made a Groupchat hoping everyone to behave. (He put too much hope into it, no one is behaving). It end up as we all expected, Chaos... At least it's entertaining...  -   Harleen: Monkeys are terrifying creature ngl Harleen: did you know Chimpanzees rips off the balls of their rivals or enemy? Harleen: gruesome shit.   Jason: You learn new things every day   Tim: I do not need to read that at fucking 10 pm in patrol night.   Steph: Humans can do it too if they're not a coward or afraid to be called gay Steph: but people are cowards, Start ripping off the enemies balls!!! Be the dominant Chimpanzees!!!   Cass: on it.

entry.title: I survived, but what for?
entry.summary:
Author: ThisIsNotTheWriterYouAreLookingFor

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,221Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 11

Summary: On that faithful day in Ethiopia Batman was not late to save Robin. Little did he guess that this would just be the start of a long journey full of misery and heart ache, that at the end, it all may have been worth it… But not so necessary.   a.k.a. Bruce saves Jason, but that forces him to come to the terms of his own demons, in order to help Jason with his. And Jason is recovering from the murder attempt, and has a terrible time in the meanwhile.
